package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for generic_process_execute_handle_service_name_without_domain_noun: Generic service names and methods that hide business intent instead of naming the actual use case.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule036NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule036NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule036NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario036Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule036NegativeService, input Rule036NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
